s: A cute, privacy-first Pomodoro companion for Android.
d:
FocusBuddy is a privacy-first, open-source Pomodoro timer for Android wrapped in a cozy, gamified experience. Choose a little animal companion, start a focus session, and let your buddy keep you company while you work.

Features:

  • Pomodoro timer with customizable durations (25 min, 45 min, 60 min)
  • Animal companions that cheer you on — unlock more as you level up
  • XP & level system for completed sessions
  • Daily streak tracking
  • Focus heatmap to visualize productivity
  • Multiple themes: Warm Pastel, Dark, and Paper
  • Optional notifications for session ends and streak reminders
  • Keep screen on during sessions
  • Fully offline — no ads, no trackers, no subscriptions
  • English & Turkish localization

FocusBuddy stores all data locally on your device and does not require network permissions for core functionality.
